core_principles: Dense but breathable data presentation for POS efficiency
Clear visual hierarchy using earthy, appetizing tones
design_philosophy.mood: Warm, inviting, sensory, yet highly operational.

layout_patterns.dashboard: Bento Grid (Control Room): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6. Flat background widgets with 1px subtle border #E5E1D8.
layout_patterns.pos_screen: Two-panel layout. Main menu grid (flex-1) with category tabs. Fixed Sidebar (w-96) on right for Cart/Order summary. Sidebar should have soft left shadow shadow-[-10px_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)].
layout_patterns.kds_screen: Masonry grid or flex-wrap of order cards. Dense, easily readable. Highlight status colors.
layout_patterns.receipt_print: Hidden UI in print mode. Max-width 80mm, pure B&W, monospace font, zero margins. Only the receipt container should be visible on @media print.
layout_patterns.spacing_system: Generous internal padding: p-6 or p-8 for dashboard containers. p-4 for touch-friendly POS buttons.

components_strategy.surfaces: Flat solid surfaces. Dashboard widgets use #FFFFFF background, 1px subtle earth-border. No heavy shadows.
components_strategy.buttons: Large touch targets (min-h-12 for POS). Primary uses solid #C55E38 with text-white. Hover state must explicitly define text-white. Use data-testid attributes.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn components, customized with earthy border colors and focus-visible:ring-brand-500.
components_strategy.tables: Shadcn tables for Orders List. Left align data, right align monetary values.
components_strategy.tabs: Shadcn Tabs, override fixed h-9 to h-12 for touch-friendly category switching on POS.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5), backgrounds darken to brand-600.
motion_and_interactions.kds_cards: Staggered entrance animation when new order arrives.

image_urls.description: Abstract terracotta texture for login/auth screen background
Modern restaurant interior for owner dashboard empty states or customer home

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='pos-item-add').
POS needs layout optimized for touch - big buttons, visible totals. No hover-only actions.
Implement Shadcn Tabs for menu categories. Change the default height to h-auto or py-3 for better touch targets.
Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts for the owner dashboard (Profit/Spent/Loss pie chart).
For KOT and Bill, add a Print media query in CSS that hides the sidebar and nav, setting body to white, font to mono, and formats the receipt properly.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the main dashboard headers. Keep them pure white.
Ensure total cart amount calculates correctly with CGST and SGST included.
